popularStory.headline: My Maternal 16th. Great Scottish Grandfather, Sir Robert Stewart, 1st. Lord of Innermeath and Lorne
popularStory.description:
Name: Robert Stewart, 1st. Lord of Lorne
Born: 1379 in Innermeath, Perthshire, Scotland
Married:  27 September 1397 in Scotland to Lady Joan Stewart
Children: (8)

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn於大約1387年出生在蘇格蘭培爾時，他的父親John Stewart Laird of Lorn38歲，母親Isabel Ergadia Macdougall - Countess of Lorne27歲。他和Lady Joan Stewart of Albany至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1449年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾享年63歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾格勒諾爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn于大约1387年出生在苏格兰培爾时，他的父亲John Stewart Laird of Lorn38岁，母亲Isabel Ergadia Macdougall - Countess of Lorne27岁。他和Lady Joan Stewart of Albany至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1449年在苏格兰阿吉爾享年63岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾格勒諾爾。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn was born about 1387, in Perthshire, Scotland, his father, John Stewart Laird of Lorn, was 38 and his mother, Isabel Ergadia Macdougall - Countess of Lorne, was 27. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Lady Joan Stewart of Albany. He died in 1449, in Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 63, and was buried in Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn est né environ 1387, à Perthshire, Écosse, son père, John Stewart Laird of Lorn, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Isabel Ergadia Macdougall - Countess of Lorne, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Lady Joan Stewart of Albany. Il est décédé en 1449, à Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Glenorchy, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn um 1387 in Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Stewart Laird of Lorn 38 und seine Mutter Isabel Ergadia Macdougall - Countess of Lorne 27. Er hatte mit Lady Joan Stewart of Albany mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1449 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn è nato il circa 1387 nel Perthshire, Scotland, il suo padre, John Stewart Laird of Lorn, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Ergadia Macdougall - Countess of Lorne, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Lady Joan Stewart of Albany. Morì nel 1449, nel Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lornが約1387年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Stewart Laird of Lornは38歳，母Isabel Ergadia Macdougall - Countess of Lorneは27歳であった。彼はLady Joan Stewart of Albanyとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1449年にスコットランドアルグイルで63歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルグレノーチイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn(이)가 대략 1387년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Stewart Laird of Lorn(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Ergadia Macdougall - Countess of Lorne(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Lady Joan Stewart of Albany(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1449년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 글렌르c히에 묻혔다.

mn.Glenorchy Castle, Lorn, Argyllshire, Sco: Glenorchy, Argyle, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn nasceu aproximadamente 1387, em Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Stewart Laird of Lorn, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Ergadia Macdougall - Countess of Lorne, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Lady Joan Stewart of Albany. Ele faleceu em 1449, em Argyll, Scotland, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn родился около 1387 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Stewart Laird of Lorn было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Ergadia Macdougall - Countess of Lorne, 27. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Lady Joan Stewart of Albany. Он умер в 1449 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности гленорчи, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn nació aproximadamente 1387, en Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, John Stewart Laird of Lorn, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Isabel Ergadia Macdougall - Countess of Lorne, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Lady Joan Stewart of Albany. Murió en 1449, en Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Glenorchy, Argyll, Scotland.
